name: AdvancedProjectile
shortDescription: Projectile behavior with speed, acceleration, max distance, and lifetime controls.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Control how a projectile object moves including lifetime, distance, speed, and acceleration.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: AdvancedProjectile

eventsFunctions.name: IsMaxDistanceExceeded
eventsFunctions.fullName: Max distance from starting position has been exceeded
eventsFunctions.description: Check if max distance from starting position has been exceeded (object will be deleted next frame).

eventsFunctions.name: IsLifetimeExceeded
eventsFunctions.description: Check if lifetime has been exceeded (object will be deleted next frame).

eventsFunctions.name: MaxLifetime
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the lifetime of the object. Object is deleted after property has been exceeded. Use "0" to ignore this property.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMaxLifetime
eventsFunctions.description: Change the lifetime of the object. Object is deleted after property has been exceeded. Use "0" to ignore this property.

eventsFunctions.name: RestartLifetimeTimer
eventsFunctions.description: Restart lifetime timer of object.

eventsFunctions.name: MaxDistanceFromStart
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the max distance from starting position of the object. Object is deleted after property has been exceeded. Use "0" to ignore this property.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMaxDistanceFromStart
eventsFunctions.description: Change the max distance from starting position of the object. Object is deleted after property has been exceeded. Use "0" to ignore this property.

eventsFunctions.name: SetStartingPositionToCurrentPosition
eventsFunctions.fullName: Change starting position to the current position
eventsFunctions.description: Change the starting position of object to it's current position.

eventsFunctions.name: MaxSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the max speed of the object. Object forces cannot exceed this value. Use "0" to ignore this property.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMaxSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Change the max speed of the object. Object forces cannot exceed this value. Use "0" to ignore this property.

eventsFunctions.name: MinSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the minSpeed of the object. Object forces cannot go below this value. Use "0" to ignore this property.

eventsFunctions.name: SetMinSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Change the minSpeed of the object. Object forces cannot go below this value. Use "0" to ignore this property.

eventsFunctions.name: Acceleration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the acceleration of the object. Use a negative number to slow down.

eventsFunctions.name: SetAcceleration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the acceleration of the object. Use a negative number to slow down.

eventsFunctions.name: StartingSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the starting speed of the object. Object will move in the direction it is facing when it is created. Use "0" to ignore this property.

eventsFunctions.name: SetStartingSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Change the starting speed of the object. Object will move in the direction it is facing when it is created. Use "0" to ignore this property.

eventsFunctions.name: DeleteWhenLifetimeExceeded
eventsFunctions.fullName: Automatic deletion is enabled when lifetime is exceeded
eventsFunctions.description: Check if automatic deletion is enabled when lifetime is exceeded.

eventsFunctions.name: SetDeleteWhenLifetimeExceeded
eventsFunctions.fullName: Change automatic deletion when lifetime is exceeded
eventsFunctions.description: Change automatic deletion of object when lifetime is exceeded.

eventsFunctions.name: DeleteWhenDistanceExceeded
eventsFunctions.fullName: Automatic deletion is enabled when distance from starting position is exceeded
eventsFunctions.description: Check if automatic deletion is enabled when distance from starting position is exceeded.

eventsFunctions.name: SetDeleteWhenDistanceExceeded
eventsFunctions.fullName: Change automatic deletion when distance from starting position is exceeded
eventsFunctions.description: Change automatic deletion when distance from starting position is exceeded.

description:
Control how a projectile moves including speed, acceleration, distance, and lifetime.

Tips:
- To simulate a rocket, use a starting speed of 0 and a positive acceleration (max speed may also be used)
- To simulate a hand grenade, use a high starting speed, a negative acceleration, and a non-zero lifetime
- If the object is not moving, acceleration will be towards the direction it is facing
- If the object is moving, acceleration will be in the direction the object is moving
